topic: My reflection in shop windows lags a step behind me as I walk.
title: My Reflection Walks a Step Behind Me | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: In shop windows my reflection lags one step behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: A darkened storefront window reflecting a blurred figure offset from the street, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walk the same downtown street to work every day.
scenes.image_prompt: A quiet city sidewalk lined with glass shopfronts at twilight, low light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing
A long row of shop windows along an empty street, faint reflections, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then one morning it stopped while I kept walking.
scenes.image_prompt: A storefront reflection of a standing figure as the sidewalk ahead is empty, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
A blurred figure turning sharply on a wet sidewalk, motion grain, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The reflection was still there, watching me from the glass.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette pressed close to the inside of a dark shop window, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tested every window on the block.
scenes.image_prompt: A person standing before a large reflective window on a foggy street, faint double image, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each one held my reflection a step further behind than before.
scenes.image_prompt: Three shop windows in a row each showing a reflection offset more than the last, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Soon it was half a street back, never catching up.
scenes.image_prompt: A distant reflected silhouette far down a row of glass storefronts, dim evening, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Today it turned the corner before I reached it.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty street corner with a faint figure vanishing past the edge of a window, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I take the back alleys now, where there is no glass.
scenes.image_prompt: A narrow brick alley with no windows, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But it has a head start now, and it knows my route.
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure walking away down a foggy alley at dusk, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
